stories.title: Knights recover in 2OT, outlast Canes in Game 3
stories.summary: Defenseman Shea Theodore was credited with a goal in double overtime, and the Golden Knights recovered from losing a 4-0 lead to defeat the Carolina Hurricanes 5-4 in Game 3 of the Stanley Cup Final Saturday night, giving Vegas a 2-1 lead in the series.

stories.title: Marner makes Cup history with fastest hat trick
stories.summary: Vegas star Mitch Marner made history with the fastest hat trick by a player in Stanley Cup Final history.

stories.title: Derby winner Golden Tempo wins at Belmont
stories.summary: Golden Tempo captured the third leg of the Triple Crown five weeks after winning the Kentucky Derby, making more history for trainer Cherie DeVaux.

stories.title: Mystics' Johnson ejected, escorted off by police
stories.summary: Mystics coach Sydney Johnson had to be held back while arguing with officials and was escorted off the court by police after being ejected from Saturday's blowout loss to the host Dream.

stories.title: At least 5 hurt as storm hits WVU baseball game
stories.summary: Several fans at West Virginia's super regional game were injured Saturday when heavy winds blew over an event tent next to Kendrick Family Ballpark, the university said.
